digital_rain.c(3) Library Functions Manual digital_rain.c(3)

NAME

digital_rain.c - Matrix-style digital rain effect implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define M_PI 3.14159265358979323846
#define SQRT_2 1.4142135623730951
#define SQRT_5 2.23606797749979

Functions


digital_rain_t * digital_rain_init (int num_columns, int num_rows)
Initialize digital rain effect context. void digital_rain_destroy (digital_rain_t *rain)
Destroy digital rain effect context. void digital_rain_reset (digital_rain_t *rain)
Reset digital rain effect state. void digital_rain_set_fall_speed (digital_rain_t *rain, float speed)
Set digital rain fall speed. void digital_rain_set_raindrop_length (digital_rain_t *rain, float length)
Set digital rain raindrop length. void digital_rain_set_color (digital_rain_t *rain, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
Set digital rain color. void digital_rain_set_color_from_filter (digital_rain_t *rain, color_filter_t filter)
Set digital rain color from color filter. char * digital_rain_apply (digital_rain_t *rain, const char *frame, float delta_time)
Apply digital rain effect to ASCII frame.

Detailed Description

Matrix-style digital rain effect implementation.
